allow:
Bash(# Test ACTION_SUCCESS_PATTERN
ACTION_SUCCESS_PATTERN="DEBUG_TEST_SUCCESS.*action.*([^,]+).*duration_ms.*([0-9]+)"
test_line='I/System.out(12345): {"message":"DEBUG_TEST_SUCCESS","data":{"test_id":"test_123","action":"C++ Firebase Init Test","category":"Firebase","group":"C++","duration_ms":1250},"tags":["debug","test","success"]}'

if echo "$test_line" | grep -qE "$ACTION_SUCCESS_PATTERN"; then
    action_name=$(echo "$test_line" | sed -n 's/.*"action"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p')
    duration=$(echo "$test_line" | sed -n 's/.*"duration_ms"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\([0-9]*\).*/\1/p')
    echo "✅ ACTION_SUCCESS pattern works - action: '$action_name', duration: ${duration}ms"
else
    echo "❌ ACTION_SUCCESS pattern failed"
fi)

Bash(# Test ACTION_FAILURE_PATTERN
ACTION_FAILURE_PATTERN="DEBUG_TEST_FAILURE.*action.*([^,]+).*error.*([^}]+)"
test_line='I/System.out(12345): {"message":"DEBUG_TEST_FAILURE","data":{"test_id":"test_123","action":"C++ Firebase Connection Test","category":"Firebase","group":"C++","error":"Connection timeout after 30 seconds","duration_ms":30000},"tags":["debug","test","failure"]}'

if echo "$test_line" | grep -qE "$ACTION_FAILURE_PATTERN"; then
    action_name=$(echo "$test_line" | sed -n 's/.*"action"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p')
    error_msg=$(echo "$test_line" | sed -n 's/.*"error"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"\([^"]*\)".*/\1/p')
    echo "✅ ACTION_FAILURE pattern works - action: '$action_name', error: '$error_msg'"
else
    echo "❌ ACTION_FAILURE pattern failed"
fi)

Bash(# Test duration calculation
duration=1250
duration_sec=$(echo "scale=2; $duration / 1000" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo "0.0")
echo "✅ Duration calculation: ${duration}ms = ${duration_sec}s"

# Test timeout monitoring logic
start_time=$(date +%s.%N)
sleep 0.1  # Small delay
current_time=$(date +%s.%N)
elapsed=$(echo "$current_time - $start_time" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
elapsed_int=${elapsed%.*}
echo "✅ Timeout calculation: elapsed = ${elapsed}s, int part = ${elapsed_int}s")

Bash(# Simulate the problematic conditions
LOG_FILE="nonexistent.log"
debug_success=$(grep -c "DEBUG_TEST_SUCCESS" "$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
completed_success=$(grep -c "Completed:.*\"action\"" "$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
passed_success=$(grep -c "test PASSED.*\"action\"" "$LOG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

echo "debug_success: '$debug_success'"
echo "completed_success: '$completed_success'"
echo "passed_success: '$passed_success'"

# Test arithmetic
echo $((debug_success + completed_success + passed_success)))

Bash(# Test the arithmetic expressions that could cause issues
debug_success=5
completed_success=3  
passed_success=2

echo "Testing arithmetic..."
echo $((debug_success + completed_success + passed_success))

# Test bc calculations
echo "Testing bc calculations..."
echo "scale=1; 5 * 100 / 10" | bc -l
echo "scale=1; (5 - 2) * 100 / 10" | bc -l)
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo -e "\n✅ All logger configuration commands tested successfully!")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo -e "\n1️⃣ Testing basic just commands:")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo -e "\n1️⃣ Testing config commands that might have issues:")
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo -e "\n2️⃣ Testing build status command:")
